summary: Vercel is looking for a Software Engineer to join the Growth team. You'll work on developer experience, onboarding flows, and experiments that move key acquisition metrics. The ideal candidate loves shipping fast and measuring impact.
responsibilities: Build and ship growth experiments end-to-end

summary: Linear is building the world's best issue tracking and project management tool. We're looking for a frontend engineer who cares deeply about performance, quality, and craft. You'll work directly on the core product used by thousands of engineering teams.
responsibilities: Build and iterate on core product features
Work closely with design to pixel-perfect fidelity

summary: Stripe is hiring new grad engineers across multiple product teams. You'll be embedded in a team and own real projects within your first few weeks. Stripe values speed, reliability, and beautiful APIs.

Figma is building the future of collaborative design. The Editor team owns the core canvas, rendering engine, and real-time collaboration features. This is a high-impact role for engineers who care about pushing the web to its limits.
responsibilities: Work on the core design canvas
Collaborate with the CRDT infrastructure team
nice_to_have: Experience with Skia or similar graphics libraries
Prior work on collaborative editing tools

summary: Anthropic is an AI safety company working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. We're looking for research engineers to work at the intersection of ML research and engineering — someone who can both implement novel ideas and make them scale.
responsibilities: Implement and scale ML research experiments
Build tooling to support rapid iteration
Collaborate with researchers on novel ideas
requirements: Ability to work across research and engineering
nice_to_have: PhD in ML or related field

summary: Raycast is a blazing fast, totally extendable launcher for your Mac. We're a small, fully remote team building productivity tools loved by developers. You'll contribute directly to the core product and work on features shipped to hundreds of thousands of users.
responsibilities: Build and iterate on Raycast extensions platform
Improve performance and reliability of the core app
Ship features to a demanding audience of power users
